Operation 'createOrUpdateCustomer' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is identical to summary and lacks essential details. Improved version explains the upsert behavior, clarifies input/output schemas, and describes side effects (record creation or update). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new customer or updates an existing customer's profile in MoEngage. Accepts customer identifiers and attributes via CustomerRequest. If the customer exists, their attributes are updated; if new, a customer record is created. Returns a CustomerResponse confirming the operation success and customer details. Supports upsert semantics - idempotent for repeated calls with same data.
data.reasoning: Original description is identical to summary and lacks essential details. Improved version explains the upsert behavior, clarifies input/output schemas, and describes side effects (record creation or update). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'trackEvent' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks specificity about what constitutes an event, input requirements, and processing behavior. Enhanced version clarifies the EventRequest structure, explains the purpose of event tracking in the platform, describes asynchronous processing, and notes immutability. This enables AI agents to understand the operation's role in the engagement platform.

data.current_summary: Track a custom event for a user
data.current_description: Track a custom event for a user
data.description_suggestion: Records a custom event for a user in MoEngage's event tracking system. Accepts event data via EventRequest including user identifier, event name, timestamp, and custom attributes. Events are asynchronously processed and used for user segmentation, campaign targeting, and analytics. Returns success confirmation. Events are immutable once recorded.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what constitutes an event, input requirements, and processing behavior. Enhanced version clarifies the EventRequest structure, explains the purpose of event tracking in the platform, describes asynchronous processing, and notes immutability. This enables AI agents to understand the operation's role in the engagement platform.

message: Operation 'deleteUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is minimal and doesn't convey the permanence or scope of the deletion. Improved version emphasizes irreversibility, clarifies what data is affected, specifies the input requirement, and warns about the destructive nature. This is critical for AI agents to avoid accidental data loss.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a user (customer) and all associated data from MoEngage. Requires user identifier via DeleteUserRequest. This operation is irreversible - all user attributes, events, and engagement history are removed. Returns success confirmation. Deleted users cannot be restored.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and doesn't convey the permanence or scope of the deletion. Improved version emphasizes irreversibility, clarifies what data is affected, specifies the input requirement, and warns about the destructive nature. This is critical for AI agents to avoid accidental data loss.

message: Operation 'listCampaigns' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description provides no context about pagination, filtering, or return structure. Enhanced version explains the paginated nature, mentions parameter support, describes the CampaignList response structure, and provides use case context. This helps AI agents understand how to retrieve and iterate through campaigns.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all campaigns in the MoEngage account. Supports filtering and pagination via query parameters. Returns a CampaignList containing campaign objects with metadata including campaign ID, name, status, and creation date. Use this operation to discover available campaigns before retrieving detailed statistics or targeting specific campaigns.
data.reasoning: Original description provides no context about pagination, filtering, or return structure. Enhanced version explains the paginated nature, mentions parameter support, describes the CampaignList response structure, and provides use case context. This helps AI agents understand how to retrieve and iterate through campaigns.

message: Operation 'getCampaignStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks specificity about what statistics are returned and how to identify the campaign. Improved version clarifies the required campaignId parameter, describes the CampaignStats response structure with example metrics, and provides context for when to use this operation. This enables AI agents to retrieve and interpret campaign performance data.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed performance statistics for a specific campaign identified by campaignId path parameter. Returns CampaignStats object containing metrics such as impressions, clicks, conversions, engagement rates, and delivery status. Use this operation to monitor campaign performance and measure ROI of marketing initiatives.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what statistics are returned and how to identify the campaign. Improved version clarifies the required campaignId parameter, describes the CampaignStats response structure with example metrics, and provides context for when to use this operation. This enables AI agents to retrieve and interpret campaign performance data.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all user segments defined in the MoEngage account.
